texto: Permissiveness is the principle of treating children as if they were adults
autor: and the tactic of making sure they never reach that stage.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a and the tactic of making sure they never reach that stage.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Permissiveness is the principle of treating children as if they were adults” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, thomas-szasz, permissiveness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
